title: Radial Offhand
description: A faster way to put items into offhand
body:
![Wide-format screenshot featuring a radial menu on the screen.](https://github.com/DevHrytsan/RadialOffHand/blob/main/promo/RadialOffhandBackgroundVideo1.gif?raw=true)

# Radial Offhand
This mod adds an intuitive radial menu for offhand.

With it, you just hold the key (default Z), move your mouse toward the item you want on your offhand, and release.

## IMPORTANT NOTE

⚠ If you are using [Kilt](https://modrinth.com/mod/kilt) (a mod that allows loading Forge mods on Fabric), the **"Allow Movement"** feature of the radial hotbar may break.
This happens because [Kilt aggressively overrides hotkeys](https://github.com/DevHrytsan/RadialHotBar/issues/8) when a screen is open.
As a workaround, please use [InvMove](https://modrinth.com/mod/invmove).

If you choose to download this mod from sources other than the ModRinth, please be aware that you do so at your own risk.

You may not reupload this mod to other websites, launchers, apps or place it behind ad links.  

## Config
You can easily configure options to your liking using Fabric with [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu), or via the Mods tab in Forge, NeoForge.


## Feedback & Suggestions
Feel free to open an issue or leave a suggestion on the [Github](https://github.com/DevHrytsan/radialoffhand/issues).
